name: Devil's Advocate: The Mostly True Story of Giovanni Di Stefano
original_name: Devil's Advocate: The Mostly True Story of Giovanni Di Stefano
overview: A look at the life of Giovanni Di Stefano, a fraudster who pretended to be a lawyer so that he could defend the likes of Manuel Noriega, Saddam Hussein, Slobodan Milosevic, Charles Manson and others.

trailers.title: Devil’s Advocate: The Mostly True Story Of Giovanni Di Stefano | Official MSNBC Trailer
